channel.title: wooly mammoth's mighty absence
channel.description: Recent content on wooly mammoth's mighty absence

item.title: no justice, no joy
item.description: How do I feel joy and mirth when life's greatest chance for blissful irony has passed us by?

item.title: goods, 2020
item.description: Things I saw, listened to, read, or otherwise happened to me in 2020. Well, the things I liked.

item.title: How to See Through Fog: A Project
item.description: https://www.absentmammoth.org began in a much different form all the way back in January. Getting it to where it is today took dozens of hours and occupied most of my free time for several months. Making this website gave me something positive to focus on and has been a sick learning experience. I pushed myself more while working on it than I have with anything else in ages.

item.title: self-Deprecation
item.description: This is a post about self-deprecation. This is me thinking through thoughts. It is a 'web log.'
